ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Womens J14 4X+) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Rolling, Regatta) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event takes place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who organizes the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for event registration */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the crew is participating in */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew */,
  "crew_type" TEXT /* Type of crew (e.g., 4X+, 8+) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the crew */,
  "crew_status" TEXT /* Status of the crew (e.g., Registered, Active, Disqualified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crews_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew the member is part of */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "seat_position" TEXT /* Seat position of the member (e.g., Bow, 2, 3, Stk, Cox) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the crew */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the member left the crew (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., Rower, Coxswain) */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the member belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the club */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew the result belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the crew in the event (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the crew to complete the event */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Confirmed, Disputed, Invalid) */,
  "final_position" TEXT /* Final position of the crew after any disputes or changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member the metric belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the metric belongs to */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew the metric belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the member to complete the event */,
  "stroke_rate" INTEGER /* Average stroke rate of the member during the event */,
  "distance_covered" INTEGER /* Distance covered by the member during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_performance_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_performance_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_performance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Event Organizer, Team Manager, Rower) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the official is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the official belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., Judge, Umpire) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the official was assigned to the event */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of the official's performance (e.g., Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_officials_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_officials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_types" (
  "crew_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew type */,
  "crew_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crew type */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required for the crew type */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age required for the crew type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_positions" (
  "seat_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat position */,
  "seat_position_name" TEXT /* Name of the seat position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seat position */,
  "min_weight" INTEGER /* Minimum weight required for the seat position */,
  "max_weight" INTEGER /* Maximum weight required for the seat position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "min_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum experience required for the role (in years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event (in meters) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
